form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 7th in a Grade 5 on April 4 over 340m at Gunnedah behind Train Of Thought beaten 4.5 lengths (20.28). Fought on last time. Has the ability and right in the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 7th in a Grade 5 on April 4 over 340m at Gunnedah behind Train Of Thought beaten 4.5 lengths (20.28). Fought on last time. Has the ability and right in the mix.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 2 for the first time after finishing a 9 length sixth at Goulburn (20.43) in a Grade 5. Can hit the frame with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Lines up from box 2 for the first time after finishing a 9 length sixth at Goulburn (20.43) in a Grade 5. Can hit the frame with the right run.

form.formComment: Showing promise but missed the frame last start when fourth at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Looks a danger to the top few if returns to best form this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Showing promise but missed the frame last start when fourth at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Looks a danger to the top few if returns to best form this time.

form.formComment: Won by 2 lengths at this track (19.00) beating Nangar County in a Maiden on April 1. Will find this much tougher but he's got good box manners and speed. Was strongly supported and ran right away with it last time. Follow up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won by 2 lengths at this track (19.00) beating Nangar County in a Maiden on April 1. Will find this much tougher but he's got good box manners and speed. Was strongly supported and ran right away with it last time. Follow up.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 330m at this track. Hard to entertain this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 330m at this track. Hard to entertain this time.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings at her last run before a break of ten weeks when seventh at Nowra over 520m. Drawn wide and prefer others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of the placings at her last run before a break of ten weeks when seventh at Nowra over 520m. Drawn wide and prefer others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted outwards after the winning post and collided.

form.formComment: Came from wide draw and finished 4th over 330m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (19.57) behind White And Black in a Grade 5 on February 11. Prepared to risk this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Came from wide draw and finished 4th over 330m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (19.57) behind White And Black in a Grade 5 on February 11. Prepared to risk this time.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 330m. Has failed to show enough to come into contention.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fifth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 330m. Has failed to show enough to come into contention.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was slow to begin and was hampered in the run to the 1st turn.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors two back when third (19.25) over 330m at this track. In the mix on his best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors two back when third (19.25) over 330m at this track. In the mix on his best form.

form.formComment: Last start finished 3rd in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 4 over 390m at Shepparton behind Spanish Armada beaten 5 lengths (22.80). Close to the speed and boxed on well at the latest run. Key chance again.
